name: gosymdb
description: Local Go symbol and call-edge index. Build a SQLite index of Go symbols and call edges, then query it: find symbols, look up definitions, trace callers/callees, compute blast radius, detect dead code, and find interface implementors.

positive: look up a Go symbol definition, callers, or callees in an indexed repo
find what calls a Go function or method (blast radius analysis)
detect dead code or unused functions in a Go codebase
find types that implement a Go interface or interfaces a type satisfies
search Go symbols by name, package, or signature substring
negative: the user wants to search code with grep or ripgrep without a gosymdb index
the codebase is not Go (e.g. TypeScript, Python, Rust)
no gosymdb.sqlite index has been built yet and the user hasn't asked to build one
the user wants to run or build Go code (use go run/build instead)
the user wants git history or blame information

globalFlags.name: auto-reindex
globalFlags.description: Automatically detect and re-index stale packages before query execution.

commands.name: index
commands.description: Walk a directory tree, find all go.mod files, build a SQLite symbol+call index. Run this first before any query commands.

flags.name: root
flags.description: Root directory to scan for go.mod files.

commands.name: find
commands.description: Search symbols by name, package, file, or kind. All filters optional; omitting all returns every symbol up to --limit.

flags.name: pkg
flags.description: Full package path prefix filter (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/internal/cmd). Short names like 'cmd' will not match.

flags.name: kind
flags.description: Filter by symbol kind: func, method, type, interface, var, const.

flags.name: count
flags.description: Print only the integer count to stdout.

commands.name: def
commands.description: Exact single-symbol lookup by name or fully-qualified name. Returns one result or an ambiguity list with a --pkg hint.

args.name: name
args.description: Symbol name or fully-qualified name (fqname) to look up.

flags.name: pkg
flags.description: Disambiguate by package path prefix when name matches multiple symbols.

commands.name: callers
commands.description: Direct or transitive callers of a symbol (BFS up to --depth N). Use --depth 1 for direct callers only.

flags.name: symbol
flags.description: fqname or short name (auto-resolved if unambiguous). Get exact fqname from find/def. Required.

flags.name: fuzzy
flags.description: Also match symbols containing --symbol as a substring.

flags.name: pkg
flags.description: Restrict callers to this package path prefix.

flags.name: is-test
flags.description: Only return callers from test files (*_test.go).

flags.name: count
flags.description: Print only the integer count to stdout.

flags.name: explain
flags.description: Show normalized inputs, active filters, and traversal settings.

commands.name: callees
commands.description: List all symbols called by a symbol (one hop, inverse of callers). Shows what a function calls.

flags.name: symbol
flags.description: fqname or short name (auto-resolved if unambiguous). Get exact fqname from find. Required.

flags.name: fuzzy
flags.description: Also match symbols containing --symbol as a substring.

flags.name: pkg
flags.description: Restrict callees to this package path prefix.

flags.name: unique
flags.description: One row per callee instead of per call site.

flags.name: count
flags.description: Print only the integer count to stdout.

commands.name: blast-radius
commands.description: Transitive callers of a symbol — full impact at every depth, with test/prod split. Use before refactoring.

flags.name: symbol
flags.description: Exact full fqname as stored in index. Get it from find. Required.

flags.name: fuzzy
flags.description: Also match symbols containing --symbol as a substring.

flags.name: pkg
flags.description: Restrict results to callers in this package path prefix.

flags.name: exclude-tests
flags.description: Omit test callers from results and traversal.

flags.name: explain
flags.description: Show normalized inputs and recursive traversal filters.

commands.name: dead
commands.description: List symbols with no callers (dead code candidates). Unexported symbols only by default.

flags.name: kind
flags.description: Filter by kind: func or method (default: both).

commands.name: implementors
commands.description: Find types that implement an interface, or interfaces a type satisfies. Bridges the gap callers/callees can't cross.

flags.name: iface
flags.description: Partial interface fqname → returns implementing types. Required unless --type given.

flags.name: type
flags.description: Partial type fqname → returns satisfied interfaces. Required unless --iface given.

flags.name: explain
flags.description: Show normalized mode and query matching details.

commands.name: references
commands.description: Find where a type is used: type assertions, type switches, composite literals, conversions, field accesses, embeds.

flags.name: symbol
flags.description: Type fqname or short name. Get exact fqname from find/def. Required.

flags.name: ref-kind
flags.description: Filter by reference kind: type_assert, type_switch, composite_lit, conversion, field_access, embed.

flags.name: count
flags.description: Print only the integer count to stdout.

commands.name: packages
commands.description: List all indexed packages with symbol and function counts.

commands.name: health
commands.description: Report index quality: symbol/call counts, load warnings, and unresolved-call ratio.

commands.name: agent-context
commands.description: Dump complete API reference for all commands in one shot. Use this to bootstrap an agent's knowledge of gosymdb.
